title: Ai14 Genotyping
steps: Thaw reagent on ice for 00:10:00, minutes
Prepare Sample : 13.1 uL milliQ 2 uL 10x PCR Buffer 0.5 Advance 2 Polymerase Mix 0.4 uL 10 mM dNTP 1 uL Ai14 WT Forward 1 uL Ai14 WT Reverse 1 uL Ai14 Mutant Forward 1 uL Ai14 Mutan Reverse
Pipette 19 µL of Sample into 0.2 mL Tube
Add 1 µL of DNA to each tube
Select "Ai14" PCR protocol on the thermocycler
Run 15 uL of PCR samples and a DNA ladder on a 200 uL 1x TAE 4 mg of agarose at 120 V for 01:00:00 or until the dye is somewhat in the middle of the gel.
creator: Ronald.zegarra
